name: Pack Of 20: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Salmon & Trout Chunks in Gravy 400g
description: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Salmon & Trout Chunks in Gravy (Pack of 20) , fully balanced all-natural cat food with salmon & trout protein. Carefully formulated by a cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein .................. 7.5% Fat ...................... 4.5% Crude Ash ................. 2% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ... 0.3% Moisture ...................... 82% INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal by-products, cereals, fish and fish by-products (4% salmon, 4% trout), minerals, vegetable by-products, sugar. MINERALS: Taurine, Zinc, Manganese, Copper. VITAMINS: Vit. D3, Vit. E.
